response:
Title: French Garden Rustic Bronze Outdoor Post Light
Category: Lighting
Brand: Franklin Iron Works
Description: This rustic outdoor post light features a decorative leaf and vine motif finished in bronze with elegant clear seedy glass.
Details: Designed for wet locations, this 17-inch fixture mounts to a standard 3-inch diameter post and utilizes a single 60-watt bulb.

Title: Pound, Tap, & Shake Musical Learning Set
Category: Toys & Games
Brand: Hape
Description: An award-winning musical toy set designed to foster early development through hammering, xylophone play, and rhythmic drumming.
Details: This sustainable wooden set features non-toxic, child-safe construction that helps toddlers build fine motor skills, coordination, and audio recognition.

Title: Aluminum Front Shock Tower for 1/10 RC Models
Category: RC Hobby Parts
Brand: Integy
Description: A precision-machined upgrade for 1/10 scale 2WD Slash and Stampede vehicles designed to enhance structural durability and aesthetic appeal.
Details: This lightweight component is crafted from high-quality materials to provide superior strength and performance compared to stock parts.

Title: Bluetooth Keyboard Case for 9.7-inch iPad
Category: Electronics
Brand: Unbranded
Description: This slim, protective folio case transforms your 9.7-inch iPad into a laptop with an integrated Bluetooth keyboard.
Details: It features silent ABS keys, a 130-degree adjustable tilt, and smart auto wake/sleep functionality for enhanced battery efficiency.

Title: TechSkin Full Body Protector for Sony Xperia Z3 Tablet Compact
Category: Electronics
Brand: Skinomi
Description: A comprehensive full-body screen and casing protector designed to shield your device from scratches and daily wear.
Details: Features military-grade, self-healing thermoplastic urethane that offers an invisible, bubble-free, and HD-clear finish.

Title: Wansenda 64GB USB-C & USB 3.0 OTG Flash Drive
Category: Electronics
Brand: Wansenda
Description: A versatile 64GB dual-connector flash drive designed to expand storage and back up files directly from compatible smartphones and computers.
Details: Features high-speed USB 3.0 performance and a 2-in-1 design with both Type-C and USB-A connectors for plug-and-play convenience.

Title: Cat 5e Plenum Ethernet Bulk Cable
Category: Electronics
Brand: Vertical Cable
Description: A 1,000-foot gray Cat 5e UTP bulk ethernet cable designed for high-speed indoor plenum network installations.
Details: Constructed with 24 AWG solid bare copper and FEP insulation, this cable is UL-listed as CMP for superior flame resistance and meets TIA/EIA-568-C.2 specifications.

Title: Zeluga Professional Leather Tool Belt Set
Category: Tools & Home Improvement
Brand: Zeluga
Description: This durable, one-size-fits-all leather tool belt is designed for carpenters, electricians, and construction professionals.
Details: Features a heavy-duty construction with two spacious pockets secured by a reliable buckle closure for efficient tool organization.

Title: Bacteria Meme PopGrip Phone Stand
Category: Electronics
Brand: PopSockets
Description: An expandable, repositionable phone grip and stand featuring a humorous microscopic bacteria design.
Details: The swappable top allows for easy removal to enable wireless charging and provides a hands-free viewing experience for your device.

Title: FirstLight 114mm Newtonian Telescope with Twilight Nano Mount
Category: Telescopes
Brand: Explore Scientific
Description: This Newtonian telescope offers a 114mm aperture and 500mm focal length for clear celestial observations.
Details: It includes a stable Twilight Nano alt-azimuth mount, a Plossl 25mm eyepiece, a red dot finder, and a smartphone adapter for easy astrophotography.

Title: GE Pressure Switch Replacement
Category: Appliances
Brand: General Electric
Description: This is a genuine replacement pressure switch designed for compatible General Electric appliances.
Details: The electric pressure switch comes as a single unit with compact dimensions suitable for standard installations.

Title: Nothing Personal: Associates Expansion
Category: Board Games
Brand: Game Salute
Description: This expansion introduces new character types and casino locations to the base Nothing Personal board game.
Details: The set includes over 40 gangster cards and two casino cards designed to support 3-5 players over a 120-minute playtime.

Title: Sony ICD-SX2000 High-Resolution Digital Voice Recorder
Category: Electronics
Brand: Sony
Description: A portable high-resolution digital recorder designed for capturing studio-quality audio in multiple formats.
Details: Features adjustable stereo microphones and 16GB of internal memory with expandable storage via an SD card slot.

Title: Glitter Hard Shell Case for MacBook Air 13-inch
Category: Electronics
Brand: G JGOO
Description: This protective hard shell case features a shimmering glitter finish designed specifically for 13-inch MacBook Air models with Retina Display and Touch ID.
Details: The set includes a two-piece snap-on cover, a matching keyboard skin, and a screen protector to provide comprehensive protection against scratches, dust, and slips.

Title: NGK Standard Series Spark Plug 4-Pack
Category: Automotive
Brand: NGK
Description: This four-pack of standard spark plugs is designed as a direct stock replacement for 1991-2002 Saturn SL1 1.9L engines.
Details: These plugs feature a durable nickel-alloy electrode with a copper core for improved heat transfer, combustion efficiency, and corrosion resistance.

Title: Rear View Camera Connection Cable for Mazda
Category: Electronics
Brand: Germes Lab.
Description: This connection cable allows for the integration of an aftermarket rear-view camera directly into your vehicle's OEM monitor without needing extra video interfaces.
Details: Featuring a plug-and-play design, this cable supports automatic rear-view activation when the vehicle is shifted into reverse.

Title: Geek Smart Biometric Keypad Door Lock
Category: Home Security
Brand: Geek Smart
Description: A versatile smart door lock featuring multiple access methods including fingerprint, keypad, app control, and mechanical key.
Details: This device offers remote access capabilities and multiple secure entry options, making it ideal for residential, rental, and office environments.

Title: Hammond Collection Jurassic Park III Ankylosaurus
Category: Toys & Games
Brand: Mattel
Description: A premium, movie-accurate Ankylosaurus action figure celebrating the 30th anniversary of Jurassic Park.
Details: This highly detailed figure features 19 points of articulation and realistic textures designed for authentic posing and display.

Title: RGB-A111 II Smartphone Video Rig with LED Light Kit
Category: Electronics
Brand: Neewer
Description: A versatile handheld smartphone video stabilizer featuring integrated RGB LED lighting for professional-grade mobile content creation.
Details: This rig includes dual handles, a wireless Bluetooth shutter, and dual-power capabilities to support horizontal or vertical shooting with multiple cold shoe mounts.

Title: ELine Series Front Brake and Rotor Kit
Category: Automotive
Brand: R1 Concepts
Description: This all-in-one front brake upgrade includes two zinc-plated G3000 cast iron rotors and four semi-metallic brake pads for enhanced stopping power.
Details: The kit features precision-drilled and slotted rotors for superior heat dissipation and noise-reducing shims for quiet, consistent braking performance.
